description: Configure VS Code to launch and debug a polyglot microservice architecture and fix identified software bugs. In .vscode/tasks.json, create a background task named "Start Redis" that runs redis-server. In .vscode/launch.json, configure "Python API" (launching api/main.py), "Node Worker" (launching worker/processor.js), and a compound configuration "Full Stack" that launches both and triggers "Start Redis" via preLaunchTask. Fix the race condition in api/main.py where redis.publish executes before the database transaction commit(), and resolve the null reference bug in worker/processor.js where row.description.length crashes on null values.
